source_title: 别让电视只看新闻，一根线直接变家庭KTV

style_guide.format: vertical short video, 9:16, realistic commercial keyframe
style_guide.visual_style: clean Chinese ecommerce short-video ad, warm family living room, practical product demo, natural light, high clarity
style_guide.characters: Chinese family, presenter, grandparents, parents, child when needed
style_guide.product: Kinglucky/K7 wood-grain speaker-style karaoke cinema set-top box, black front panel, wireless microphones, remote control, HDMI cable
style_guide.continuity: use the same cozy living room, same TV wall, same product kit, consistent wardrobe and warm lighting across keyframes
style_guide.subtitle_policy: Do not render visible subtitles or overlay text in keyframes or generated video; voiceover only.
style_guide.audio_policy: One coherent Mandarin female voiceover, minimal repetition, warm short-video ad style, with original copyright-safe background music.

storyboard.visual_beat: 客厅电视柜上的金运 K7 木纹主机和无线麦克风，电视从普通节目切换为家庭娱乐界面，画面不出现字幕。
storyboard.voiceover: 家里的电视别只拿来看新闻。接上金运 K7，客厅马上多一个家庭娱乐中心。
storyboard.camera: medium-wide living-room shot, family and TV both visible
storyboard.motion: fast cut, strong contrast, energetic opening beat
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: 近景展示 K7 木纹箱体、黑色前面板和两支无线麦克风，主持人只露手部拿起高清线，画面无脸无字。
storyboard.voiceover: 它是木纹音箱式主机，摆在电视柜上不突兀，配上无线麦克风，老人孩子都能用。
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame
storyboard.motion: fast cut, strong contrast, energetic opening beat
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: 客厅茶几上摆放 K7 主机、遥控器、麦克风，电视处于待连接状态，营造在家娱乐升级前的场景。
storyboard.voiceover: 不用专门去 KTV，也不用换新电视，想唱歌、看电影、聚会热闹一下，在家就能开始。
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: 手部把高清线连接 K7 主机和电视，线材和接口清楚可见，产品外观保持真实木纹款式。
storyboard.voiceover: 一根高清线连上电视，开机进入点歌和影音界面，操作比想象中简单。
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame
storyboard.motion: fast cut, strong contrast, energetic opening beat
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: K7 后部接口、遥控器和无线麦克风依次展示，强调一套设备完成连接。
storyboard.voiceover: 接口、遥控器、麦克风都集中在一套设备里，少接线，少折腾。
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: 电视界面亮起，显示抽象的家庭娱乐分类和图标，不出现真实歌名、平台名或字幕。
storyboard.voiceover: 打开后可以找热门歌单、经典老歌、家庭歌单，也能切换到观影娱乐内容。
storyboard.camera: over-the-shoulder TV interface shot, screen content dominant
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: 手部拿遥控器进行语音搜索，电视上出现虚构分类图标，旁边是 K7 主机和麦克风。
storyboard.voiceover: 不会打字也没关系，按遥控器说出想找的内容，长辈也能轻松上手。
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: 虚构 AI 家庭成员以背影和侧影进入客厅，拿起麦克风互动，产品始终在电视柜上可见。
storyboard.voiceover: 朋友来家里、周末陪爸妈、孩子想唱儿歌，都不用临时出门安排。
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame
storyboard.negative_prompt: no visible captions, no subtitles, no readable text, no real-person face in first frame, no watermark, no real song names, no platform logos

storyboard.visual_beat: 同一台电视从 K 歌界面切到观影娱乐界面，只使用抽象海报和图标，不出现版权内容。
storyboard.voiceover: 它不只是 K 歌机，更像客厅里的影音娱乐一体机，让电视重新用起来。

storyboard.visual_beat: 产品主机和无线麦克风同框，客厅家庭氛围热闹但无清晰正脸，画面没有促销文字。
storyboard.voiceover: 现在活动期下单配无线麦克风，想把电视升级成家庭 KTV 的，可以点进来看看。
